conversations.message: Halt, intruder! You dare enter this tower? Prepare to feel the fury of the arcane!
Foolish creature! The Ruby Crystal will never be yours. This is where you burn!

replies.text: Your confidence will be your downfall.

conversations.message: Impossible... The Red Crystal... is yours. But the other towers... they will not fall so easily...
You have come far, little elf. Not far enough. The Amber Crystal stays with me!

replies.text: Your confidence will be your downfall.

conversations.message: Impossible... The Orange Crystal... is yours. But the other towers... they will not fall so easily...
Lightning strikes once. I strike repeatedly. Surrender the Solar Crystal? Never!

replies.text: Your confidence will be your downfall.

conversations.message: Impossible... The Yellow Crystal... is yours. But the other towers... they will not fall so easily...
The Emerald Crystal pulses with the life-force of a thousand forests. You are nothing next to that!

replies.text: Your confidence will be your downfall.

conversations.message: Impossible... The Green Crystal... is yours. But the other towers... they will not fall so easily...
Drown in your ambition! The Sapphire Crystal belongs to the deep!

replies.text: Your confidence will be your downfall.

conversations.message: Impossible... The Blue Crystal... is yours. But the other towers... they will not fall so easily...
You cannot see the void, but the void sees you. And it is laughing.

replies.text: Your confidence will be your downfall.

conversations.message: Impossible... The Indigo Crystal... is yours. But the other towers... they will not fall so easily...
Shadows birthed me. Shadows will consume you. Give up on the Amethyst Crystal!

replies.text: Your confidence will be your downfall.

conversations.message: Impossible... The Violet Crystal... is yours. But the other towers... they will not fall so easily...
Holy light scorches the impure! The Ivory Crystal is beyond your reach!

replies.text: Your confidence will be your downfall.

conversations.message: Impossible... The White Crystal... is yours. But the other towers... they will not fall so easily...
Death is not the end, little elf. It is only the beginning of your suffering!

replies.text: Your confidence will be your downfall.

conversations.message: Impossible... The Black Crystal... is yours. But the other towers... they will not fall so easily...
Brave wanderer! The Ruby Tower burns with the wrath of its Grand Archmage. I have tried to reclaim it — and failed. Will you try where I could not?

replies.text: Tell me about the Ruby Tower.
Do you have another task for me?

conversations.message: The Ruby Tower has 4 floors of hostile mages before you reach the top. Each floor is more dangerous than the last. The Grand Archmage at the summit holds the Red Crystal. Defeat them and claim it!
Yes, actually — Recover the stolen fire grimoire from the bandits east of the tower.
You did it! The Red Crystal! I cannot believe it... You are truly remarkable. Now — collect all nine and seek the Tower of Convergence. That is where the real secret lies.
The Amber Tower is sealed tight as a drum. A cruel mage holds the Amber Crystal hostage within. I need someone bolder than I to storm it.

replies.text: Tell me about the Amber Tower.
Do you have another task for me?

conversations.message: The Amber Tower has 4 floors of hostile mages before you reach the top. Each floor is more dangerous than the last. The Grand Archmage at the summit holds the Orange Crystal. Defeat them and claim it!
Yes, actually — Gather 5 vials of amber dust from the cave creatures to the north.
You did it! The Orange Crystal! I cannot believe it... You are truly remarkable. Now — collect all nine and seek the Tower of Convergence. That is where the real secret lies.
I used to study in the Solar Tower before that archmage usurped it. The Solar Crystal is mine by right — but I lack the strength to take it back. You look capable.

replies.text: Tell me about the Solar Tower.
Do you have another task for me?

conversations.message: The Solar Tower has 4 floors of hostile mages before you reach the top. Each floor is more dangerous than the last. The Grand Archmage at the summit holds the Yellow Crystal. Defeat them and claim it!
Yes, actually — Find the three shards of the solar focusing lens scattered in the ruins.
You did it! The Yellow Crystal! I cannot believe it... You are truly remarkable. Now — collect all nine and seek the Tower of Convergence. That is where the real secret lies.
Dark roots of magic have overrun the Emerald Tower. The Grand Archmage within communes with corrupted nature. The Emerald Crystal must be freed!

replies.text: Tell me about the Emerald Tower.
Do you have another task for me?

conversations.message: The Emerald Tower has 4 floors of hostile mages before you reach the top. Each floor is more dangerous than the last. The Grand Archmage at the summit holds the Green Crystal. Defeat them and claim it!
Yes, actually — Harvest 7 moonleaf herbs from the forest glade south of the tower.
You did it! The Green Crystal! I cannot believe it... You are truly remarkable. Now — collect all nine and seek the Tower of Convergence. That is where the real secret lies.
The sea sings of danger around the Sapphire Tower. The Grand Archmage has flooded the lower halls. Only a true fighter can wade through and claim the Sapphire Crystal.

replies.text: Tell me about the Sapphire Tower.
Do you have another task for me?

conversations.message: The Sapphire Tower has 4 floors of hostile mages before you reach the top. Each floor is more dangerous than the last. The Grand Archmage at the summit holds the Blue Crystal. Defeat them and claim it!
Yes, actually — Drain the flooded basement by defeating the water elemental inside.
You did it! The Blue Crystal! I cannot believe it... You are truly remarkable. Now — collect all nine and seek the Tower of Convergence. That is where the real secret lies.
The Mystic Tower disturbs me. Visions of void. Whispers of nothingness. The Grand Archmage within has surrendered to the darkness. Stop them. Take the Mystic Crystal.

replies.text: Tell me about the Mystic Tower.
Do you have another task for me?

conversations.message: The Mystic Tower has 4 floors of hostile mages before you reach the top. Each floor is more dangerous than the last. The Grand Archmage at the summit holds the Indigo Crystal. Defeat them and claim it!
Yes, actually — Close 4 void rifts that have opened around the tower perimeter.
You did it! The Indigo Crystal! I cannot believe it... You are truly remarkable. Now — collect all nine and seek the Tower of Convergence. That is where the real secret lies.
My shadow cat escaped into the Amethyst Tower last week. The Grand Archmage there is a menace. Reclaim the Amethyst Crystal — and if you see a small shadow cat, please bring her out.

replies.text: Tell me about the Amethyst Tower.
Do you have another task for me?

conversations.message: The Amethyst Tower has 4 floors of hostile mages before you reach the top. Each floor is more dangerous than the last. The Grand Archmage at the summit holds the Violet Crystal. Defeat them and claim it!
Yes, actually — Find and rescue the shadow cat familiar that escaped into the dark forest.
You did it! The Violet Crystal! I cannot believe it... You are truly remarkable. Now — collect all nine and seek the Tower of Convergence. That is where the real secret lies.
I built the Ivory Tower, stone by stone, blessing each one. That rogue archmage defiled it. The Ivory Crystal deserves better. Will you deliver justice?

replies.text: Tell me about the Ivory Tower.
Do you have another task for me?

conversations.message: The Ivory Tower has 4 floors of hostile mages before you reach the top. Each floor is more dangerous than the last. The Grand Archmage at the summit holds the White Crystal. Defeat them and claim it!
Yes, actually — Carry the vial of blessed water to all 5 shrines surrounding the Ivory Tower.
You did it! The White Crystal! I cannot believe it... You are truly remarkable. Now — collect all nine and seek the Tower of Convergence. That is where the real secret lies.
The Obsidian Tower stinks of necromancy. The Grand Archmage there toys with death itself. The Obsidian Crystal must not remain in those corpse-cold hands.

replies.text: Tell me about the Obsidian Tower.
Do you have another task for me?

conversations.message: The Obsidian Tower has 4 floors of hostile mages before you reach the top. Each floor is more dangerous than the last. The Grand Archmage at the summit holds the Black Crystal. Defeat them and claim it!
Yes, actually — Retrieve the forbidden tome from the graveyard before it corrupts the area.
You did it! The Black Crystal! I cannot believe it... You are truly remarkable. Now — collect all nine and seek the Tower of Convergence. That is where the real secret lies.
Davora Loremark looks up from their studies and says: "Magic is not a tool — it is a conversation with the universe."
Gryxara Ironrune looks up from their studies and says: "Every spell is a question. Every explosion is an answer."
Lucian Jademark looks up from their studies and says: "The first rule of magic: never let your staff tell you how to feel."
Brynja Whisperwind looks up from their studies and says: "I once turned myself into a sock. Longest Tuesday of my life."
Ildan Keenrune looks up from their studies and says: "The crystals hum different notes. Together, they sing something... enormous."
Kyvara Jadestone looks up from their studies and says: "Power is not measured in fireballs. It is measured in what you do NOT destroy."
Orvara Infernomark looks up from their studies and says: "My master's master's master said: read more, blast less. He was then blasted."
Hexara Duskmantle looks up from their studies and says: "Time is the only ingredient you cannot conjure more of. Use it wisely."
Orindra Deepveil looks up from their studies and says: "The void does not hate you. It is simply very, very bored."
Aelara Ironrune looks up from their studies and says: "Some mages spend decades studying teleportation. I prefer stairs. I know where they go."
Tholius Ruinmark looks up from their studies and says: "A crystal is a word the earth forgot how to say."
Jyrelle Voidmark looks up from their studies and says: "Never apologize for your arcane energy. It is, after all, just enthusiastic light."
Hexara Eclipsemark looks up from their studies and says: "I tried to summon rain once. Got a very wet cheese instead."
Fyndra Duskmantle looks up from their studies and says: "The tower knows. It always has. We are only here to listen."
Ptolemy Keenrune looks up from their studies and says: "The greatest spell is the one you did not need to cast."
Stryx Zephyrveil looks up from their studies and says: "Shadow magic is just light magic that overslept."
Erian Pyrethane looks up from their studies and says: "If the rune is glowing red, step away. If it is glowing purple, run."
Sylvara Frostwhisper looks up from their studies and says: "I have read every spellbook in this tower. I still cannot fold a fitted sheet."
Sylvan Arcanemark looks up from their studies and says: "The cosmos is vast and full of wonder. Also: do not touch the second bookshelf."
Brennus Eclipsemark looks up from their studies and says: "Magic teaches humility. Explosions teach it faster."
You have returned, champion. The nine crystals... I can feel them. Place them in the altar and witness what ancient magic has waited an age to reveal.

replies.text: I am still collecting the crystals.

conversations.message: Do not lose hope. Each crystal is a step. Each tower a test. The nine towers were built to find one worthy enough to unite what was sundered. Keep going.
Yes... I feel it! All nine! Place them now — the altar awakens!

replies.text: I place the crystals in the altar.

conversations.message: The crystals sing! The magic of all nine schools of the arcane — fire, earth, lightning, nature, water, void, shadow, holy, and death — united at last! You have bridged what centuries kept apart. The Grand Arcane Seal is broken. The world breathes again. Take this — the Prism of Unity. It is yours, and yours alone.
They say strange lights shine from the old towers to the north. Mages, I hear — dangerous ones.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Still working on those towers? The lights at the Ruby Tower haven't dimmed yet...
A traveler told me the mage towers have awakened. Something stirs within them.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
How many crystals have you collected so far? The whole village is watching.
I've heard the nine towers each hold a colored crystal. Collect all nine, they say, and something wonderful happens.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
I dreamed you had all nine. Please — make it real.
My cousin passed by the Ruby Tower last month. Said the whole top was glowing red. Hasn't been the same since.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
The tower mages grow restless, I hear. Push harder.
The mage towers? Oh yes. Nine of them, each more terrifying than the last. Looking for a brave soul to venture in?

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Any luck with the Grand Archmages? Some of them are ancient and cunning.
Word is the Grand Archmages have barricaded themselves inside the towers. Nobody knows why.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Keep going. The Tower of Convergence is waiting.
There's a 10th tower, you know. The Tower of Convergence. They say it holds the secret to what the crystals unlock.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Still working on those towers? The lights at the Ruby Tower haven't dimmed yet...
A wise woman I know said the nine crystals, when united, can reshape the world. I believe her.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
How many crystals have you collected so far? The whole village is watching.
The towers have always been there, but the mages inside them? Those are new. Something dark brought them.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
I dreamed you had all nine. Please — make it real.
I overheard a scholar say the crystals are keys. Keys to what, I daren't imagine.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
The tower mages grow restless, I hear. Push harder.
If you're hunting the mage towers, start with the Ruby Tower. It's closest. And the weakest, so they say.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Any luck with the Grand Archmages? Some of them are ancient and cunning.
The Obsidian Tower scares me most. The air around it smells of... endings.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Keep going. The Tower of Convergence is waiting.
My grandmother spoke of the Crystal Convergence. An ancient ritual. Nine towers. Nine crystals. One reward beyond measure.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Still working on those towers? The lights at the Ruby Tower haven't dimmed yet...
Are you the one the fortune-teller spoke of? The one who would unite the crystals?

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
How many crystals have you collected so far? The whole village is watching.
I tried to enter the Emerald Tower once. Got hit by a lightning bolt from inside. Never again.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
I dreamed you had all nine. Please — make it real.
They say the Grand Archmage of the Sapphire Tower can walk on water. Literally.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
The tower mages grow restless, I hear. Push harder.
The Mystic Tower gives me chills even from a distance. That indigo light... wrong, somehow.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Any luck with the Grand Archmages? Some of them are ancient and cunning.
I'd give anything to see the inside of the Tower of Convergence. Anything. But I'm not brave enough.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Keep going. The Tower of Convergence is waiting.
A mage outside the Amber Tower was looking for help last I heard. Seemed desperate.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Still working on those towers? The lights at the Ruby Tower haven't dimmed yet...
The crystals are real. I've seen one — a sliver of ruby-red, beautiful and terrible.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
How many crystals have you collected so far? The whole village is watching.
Nine towers. Nine archmages. Nine crystals. Sounds like a story, doesn't it? It's not.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
I dreamed you had all nine. Please — make it real.
The 10th tower appeared overnight, they say. One morning it just... was there. Full of peaceful mages spouting poetry.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
The tower mages grow restless, I hear. Push harder.
If you find the Amethyst Crystal, be careful. The shadow magic in that tower lingers.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

conversations.message: There are nine towers across the land, each holding a colored crystal guarded by a Grand Archmage. Defeat all nine and bring the crystals to the Tower of Convergence. What awaits you there... nobody knows.
Any luck with the Grand Archmages? Some of them are ancient and cunning.
Good luck in the towers, traveler. We're counting on you.

replies.text: Tell me more about the towers.
I am already on the quest.

Keep going. The Tower of Convergence is waiting.
